content_body:
Young Harris Water Sports is the most trusted ski boat and jet ski rental in Georgia. Since 2001, they have been helping vacationers and locals make memories on the water. They offer top-quality jet skis and ski boats at unbeatable prices. You will be outfitted with a new 3-seat Honda/Seadoo jet ski or ski boat. They take you and your family through an easy-to-understand training session, as well as Georgia/North Carolina boating rules and regulations. YH Water Sports properly fits each rider with a life vest. Each item that YH Water Sports provides is specifically designed for personal watercraft, leaving plenty of room for your other belongings.

If you are renting a ski boat, they offer wakeboards, kneeboards, tubes, & combo skis for family fun on the water. To make your day more enjoyable, you can purchase waterproof lake maps, towels, floating key chains, and many other items. YH Water Sports will deliver to any approved commercial marina or official public launch ramp on Lake Nottley, Lake Burton, Lake Blue Ridge, Lake Rabun, and Lake Seed, or you can visit them at The Ridges Resort and Club on Lake Chatuge. New to Young Harris Water Sports is Mountain Wake, a new wake-boarding cable park on Lake Chatuge. They welcome all wake enthusiasts to join in on the fun, no matter the experience level.

So if you are ready to get that jet ski, ski boat, or do some wake-boarding for some of the most enjoyable family fun on the water, then call YH Water Sports at 706.896.0834
title: Young Harris Water Sports
